title: Holon Lifecycle Verb Signatures
description: Source-of-truth contract for the seventeen holon lifecycle verbs. The JS library (lib/lifecycle.js) and any future Python bindings are both generated consumers of this schema, not independent implementations. Namespace: https://w3id.org/holon/ (intentionally ahead of the older https://ontologist.io/ns/holon# namespace used by the sce/HGA spec pending reconciliation). Verbs 1-12 operate on the per-holon schema/scene/events graph triad (graphsFor()); verbs 13-17 operate on the flat urn:{dataset}:holons/:events/:ontology graphs used by Adventure-Mode-style datasets, taking conn.dataset (plus optional holonsGraph/eventsGraph/ontologyGraph/shapesGraph overrides) instead of a holonIri-derived graph set.

ActorRef.description: The agent performing an operation. Required on every mutating verb for the prov:wasGeneratedBy trail and the authorise() capability check.

Capability.description: Owner implies Read+Write+Promote+Grant. Grant permits issuing RoleBindings with capability subset <= grantor's own (escalation guard).

DataBookRef.description: A DataBook document (markdown with fenced turtle/sparql/shacl blocks + YAML frontmatter). Every verb is DataBook-in / DataBook-out at the boundary; Turtle/SPARQL/JSON are internal transport only.

TrackablePropertyInput.description: One baseline value for a holon:trackableProperty at agent-creation time. property/capProperty/floor default from the property's own ontology metadata (holon:governedByShape, holon:capProperty, holon:floor) when omitted -- callers only need to override when a specific agent departs from the property's declared default governance.

createRootHolon.description: Establishes the pattern for all holons in a dataset -- not an instance. Sets naming convention for <base>/schema, <base>/scene, <base>/events named graphs and registers the index holon. rootLocked marks the holon as an intentional root structure (registry, corridor spine, journeys index) that moveHolon will refuse to reparent without an explicit force override.

addSchema.description: Pushes OWL/taxonomy/SHACL/named-query fenced blocks into <holon>/schema, tagged holon:hasSchema. NodeShapes here may carry holon:holonEligible / holon:eligibleChildSchema.

addEntity.description: Adds instance data conforming to the holon's schema into <holon>/scene. If the matched NodeShape carries holon:holonEligible true, writes an unresolved holon:portalPotential marker rather than minting a holon.

promoteEntity.description: Resolves an entity's holon:portalPotential into an actual child holon (lazy realization). Mints child schema/scene/event graphs seeded from holon:eligibleChildSchema, leaves a portal stub (holon:targetHolon) in the parent scene graph. Rejects if no unresolved potential exists.

addProjection.description: Registers a named query + prompt block + transmission mode + client mode against a holon. Does not mutate the scene graph.

modifyEntity.description: Standard CommandEvent: validate against schema, DELETE/INSERT on scene graph, prov:wasDerivedFrom prior state.

annotateProperty.description: Adds a reified event or annotation on a specific entity property using RDF 1.2 / Turtle 1.2 native reification (not RDF-star quoted triples, not classic rdf:Statement).

listHolonContents.description: Pure projection -- SPARQL SELECT/CONSTRUCT scoped to <holon>/scene. No event written. Read-only.

editMetadata.description: Edits the holon's registry record (title, description, status) -- not the scene graph.

deleteHolon.description: Tombstones a holon (status -> Tombstoned). Event graph is untouched (append-only). Hard purge is a separate, explicitly-gated operation (purgeHolon).

purgeHolon.description: Secondary GC operation on an already-tombstoned holon. Scheduling TBD. Distinct from the test-only clearHolarchy utility, which is recursive and unconditional and lives outside this verb set entirely.

designateAgent.description: Registers a prov:Agent/Persona/Actor with a holon:RoleBinding scoped to this holon. Enforces the escalation guard: grantor must hold Grant capability, and issued capability must be a subset of the grantor's own.

moveHolon.description: Reparents a holon -- changes holon:isPartOf (aligned 2026-07-09 from an earlier holon:parentHolon predicate to match the containment predicate actually populated in live datasets) from its current value (if any) to newParentIri. A structural containment-tree move, distinct from tracking an agent's current position within a scene. Holons flagged holon:rootLocked true (typically set via createRootHolon's rootLocked param) refuse the move unless force is true, guarding intentional root structures (registries, corridor spines, journeys indexes) against accidental reparenting. Note isPartOf is sparsely populated by design in most datasets -- a holon with no existing parent is common, not an error.

proposeAgentPropertyUpdate.description: Propose, validate, and (if valid) apply a delta to a numeric agent property governed by a SHACL shape (e.g. schema:healthPoints, schema:currentWealth) -- a bounded number that moves by discrete deltas (heal/damage, earn/spend). Validate-before-write: the proposed value (previous + delta, clamped to capProperty's current value if given, floored at floor, default 0) is checked against the governing shape using an isolated single-property payload BEFORE any triple is written; a violation throws CommandRejected and leaves no trace -- never an unapproved holon:ModelUpdateRequest, never a partial state change. On success writes a holon:ModelUpdateRequest (requestStatus already 'approved') paired with a holon:ModelUpdateApprove referencing it via holon:appliesRequest, then applies the property write. Operates on the flat urn:{dataset}:holons/:events graphs (conn.holonsGraph/eventsGraph override the urn:{dataset}: defaults); conn.shapesGraph defaults to urn:{dataset}:shacl. Unlike most other verbs in this file, this verb does not call authorise() -- no capability gate is currently enforced.

createAgent.description: Mints a new holon:Agent with baseline values for its trackable properties, writing a holon:CreationEvent plus one holon:PropertyBaselineEvent per trackable property (linked via the instance-level holon:derivedFromEvent). Closes the provenance gap where earlier Adventure Mode agents had trackable properties asserted as bare triples with no event-graph record of their starting values. Each trackableProperties entry resolves its governing shape/capProperty/floor from the property's own holon:trackableProperty ontology metadata unless the caller overrides them; a capProperty's own value (capValue) must be supplied by the caller since there is no live agent yet to query a current cap from. Validate-before-write, no exceptions: every baseline is checked against its governing shape before anything is written -- a single violating baseline rejects the whole creation, never a partial agent. Operates on the flat urn:{dataset}:holons/:events/:ontology graphs (conn.holonsGraph/eventsGraph/ontologyGraph/shapesGraph override the urn:{dataset}: defaults). Does not call authorise() -- no capability gate is currently enforced.

formGroup.description: Creates a holon:Group -- a purely spatial/co-location carrier (a tour party, a vehicle's passengers), deliberately distinct from an organizational Team or Corporation (capability/authority, modeled via holon:RoleBinding, not location). The group forms at activeMemberIri's current holon:currentLocation (required -- rejects if that member has none); every initial member has their own holon:currentLocation removed in favour of the group's location as single source of truth, and is written holon:isActive true/false per whether they are activeMemberIri. Exactly one initial member must be active; memberIris must be duplicate-free and must include activeMemberIri. Operates on the flat urn:{dataset}:holons/:events graphs. Does not call authorise() -- no capability gate is currently enforced.

joinGroup.description: Adds a member to an existing, non-tombstoned holon:Group. Rejects if memberIri already belongs to a group (leaveGroup first). The member's own holon:currentLocation is removed (the group's location is authoritative while grouped) and they are linked via holon:memberOfGroup with holon:isActive false -- joinGroup never displaces the incumbent active member. Operates on the flat urn:{dataset}:holons/:events graphs. Does not call authorise() -- no capability gate is currently enforced.

leaveGroup.description: Removes a member from a holon:Group, restoring their own holon:currentLocation from the group's current location. If the leaving member is active and other members remain, handoffTo is REQUIRED naming another current member to become active -- leaveGroup never silently picks a successor. If exactly one member remains after removal, the group auto-dissolves (tombstoned, not purged): that sole member's holon:memberOfGroup link is removed and their independent holon:currentLocation restored, and a holon:GroupDissolvedEvent is written alongside the holon:GroupLeaveEvent. Operates on the flat urn:{dataset}:holons/:events graphs. Does not call authorise() -- no capability gate is currently enforced.
